theme_and_archetype.description: Command-center focus with 'Tactical Minimalism'. Deep Obsidian anchor. High-contrast Active colors (Electric Blue for Swimming, Zen Teal for Yoga) acting as kinetic triggers.

layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] relative pb-24 overflow-x-hidden

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto h-20 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center px-4 z-50
bottom_nav.item_inactive: text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-400 flex flex-col items-center gap-1 transition-colors
bottom_nav.label: text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

card.base: bg-[#141414] rounded-3xl border border-white/5 p-6 overflow-hidden relative

mode_switcher.wrapper: flex space-x-2 bg-white/5 p-1.5 rounded-full overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
mode_switcher.tab_active: bg-white text-black rounded-full px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold shadow-sm whitespace-nowrap
mode_switcher.tab_inactive: text-zinc-400 px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold hover:text-white whitespace-nowrap transition-colors

action_button.primary: w-full bg-white text-black font-bold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 active:scale-95 transition-all
action_button.swimming: w-full bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 active:scale-95 transition-all
action_button.yoga: w-full bg-[#00BFA5] text-black font-bold rounded-2xl px-6 py-4 active:scale-95 transition-all

discipline_score.ring: w-24 h-24 rounded-full border-4 border-[#00E5FF] flex items-center justify-center

features_design_logic.activity_logger: Use a 2-column bento grid for Quick Log. Swimming card uses #00E5FF accents, Yoga card uses #00BFA5 accents. Include metric inputs (Laps/Duration).
features_design_logic.nudge_engine: Implement a sticky top banner or custom Sonner toast with a bright #FF3B30 border or background to indicate urgency. 'The pool is waiting...'
features_design_logic.meal_engine: Horizontal scrolling list of meal cards. The Mode Switcher (Home, Trip, Detox, Cheat) sits above it. Cards use real images, with calorie estimation badges.
features_design_logic.vision_upload: A dashed border (#27272A) dropzone/button in the Meal area to 'Upload Photo'. Include a simulated AI scanning state.
features_design_logic.social_feed: A horizontal row of avatars at the top or dedicated section. Each avatar has a glowing SVG border representing their Discipline Score. Add a small 'Zap' or 'Flame' icon button to Poke them.
features_design_logic.reward_badges: Use Lucide-React icons (e.g., Shield, Award, Zap) inside glassmorphic circles (bg-white/10) with glowing borders to represent streaks.
features_design_logic.charts: Use Recharts for Calorie/Step trends. Remove chart grid lines, use single distinct lines (Electric Blue). Tooltips must have dark backgrounds (#141414).

swimming_bg.description: Black and white swimmer underwater. Use as card background with heavy gradient overlay.

meal_bowl.description: Healthy vegetarian bowl for meal cards.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='log-swimming-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast on top of primary buttons is high (use black text on Electric Blue/Teal).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard FIRST. The app is a mobile app view, so constrain the main wrapper to max-w-md mx-auto.
Ensure all code generated is in standard JavaScript (.js or .jsx) since this environment does not use TypeScript (.tsx).
Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Do not use generic Shadcn cards if they break the dark tactical minimalist aesthetic; use the classes provided in the card components section.
For the bottom nav bar, use fixed positioning and backdrop-blur.
Integrate Recharts for the Progress Tracker. Keep charts minimal, hiding axes if possible.
Ensure 'data-testid' is used aggressively on all clickable items, form inputs, and metric displays.
In-app notifications (Nudges) can be built using Sonner or a custom absolute positioned banner.
The meal upload can be a mock file input that triggers a loading state and random calorie result.
